leads.trigger: Physical ID cards costly to replace
leads.trigger_quote: Badge printer system – Legacy physical ID cards
leads.gap_analysis: Physical ID card program drives recurring costs for printing, replacement, and badge printer maintenance. Mobile credential eliminates physical media entirely.
leads.recommended_action: Propose Campus ID mobile credential pilot with Apple Wallet / Google Wallet integration.

leads.gap_analysis: Multiple dining locations with separate tracking creates blind spots in revenue analysis, menu performance, and utilization trends. Unified reporting consolidates all transaction data.
leads.recommended_action: Demo Transact Insights dashboard showing cross-location revenue, peak usage, and menu item performance.

leads.gap_analysis: Manual payroll deduction reconciliation via Kronos export is error-prone and labor-intensive. Integrated Payments unifies payment processing including payroll deduct, meal plans, and declining balance.
leads.recommended_action: Show Integrated Payments payroll deduction auto-reconciliation workflow vs. current manual process.
